## Checklist
- [ ] I've tested this server and it works
- [ ] It has a README with installation instructions
- [ ] Last commit is within 6 months (or it's officially supported)
- [ ] It's not already in the list
- [ ] It follows the entry format in CONTRIBUTING.md
